name: Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long (Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long)
address: Đảo Rều, Bãi Cháy, Hạ Long, Hạ Long, Việt Nam
description:
Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long - Nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một khách sạn 5 sao đẳng cấp tọa lạc tại Hạ Long, Việt Nam. Với một loạt các tiện nghi và dịch vụ cao cấp, khách sạn này là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ.

Với vị trí thuận lợi, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố 6km và cách sân bay 150 phút lái xe. Điều này giúp du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng của Hạ Long và di chuyển thuận tiện đến và đi từ sân bay.

Khách sạn có tổng cộng 384 phòng, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng cho du khách. Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long được xây dựng vào năm 2015 và đã được nâng cấp lần cuối vào năm 2021, mang đến cho du khách những trang thiết bị và tiện nghi hiện đại.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cung cấp một loạt các tiện nghi giải trí để đáp ứng nhu cầu của du khách. Khách sạn có các cửa hàng đa dạng, nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy những món quà độc đáo hoặc các sản phẩm lưu niệm để mang về như một kỷ niệm đáng nhớ. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một quầy bar thân thiện, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống ngon và thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá. 

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và làm mới bản thân, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cũng có một salon và spa chất lượng cao. Bạn có thể tận hưởng các liệu pháp mát-xa chuyên nghiệp hoặc thưởng thức các liệu trình làm đẹp tại đây. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có các tiện ích thú vị như bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi và vườn cây xanh mát. Tất cả những điều này sẽ giúp bạn thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Hạ Long, Việt Nam.

Cơ sở thể thao tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long tọa lạc tại Hạ Long, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những du khách yêu thích thể thao. Khi lưu trú tại đây, bạn sẽ có cơ hội tận hưởng nhiều tiện nghi thể thao đẳng cấp. Khách sạn có hồ bơi trong nhà tiện nghi, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian thoáng đãng và tập luyện một cách thoải mái. Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long còn có trung tâm thể dục miễn phí, nơi bạn có thể rèn luyện sức khỏe và thể lực của mình.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị mà không phải lo lắng về các tiện ích tiện lợi. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giặt ủi, dịch vụ phòng, hòm đựng đồ an toàn, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng, khu vực hút thuốc riêng, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, dịch vụ giặt là, giữ hành lý, cửa hàng tiện lợi và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày. Với những tiện ích này, du khách có thể yên tâm tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ mà không phải lo lắng về việc tiếp cận các dịch vụ cần thiết.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển để đảm bảo du khách có một kỳ nghỉ tiện lợi và thoải mái. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách thuận tiện và nhanh chóng. Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cũng tổ chức các tour du lịch, giúp du khách khám phá và trải nghiệm những điểm đến thú vị trong khu vực. 

Khách sạn cũng có bãi đỗ xe riêng, cho phép du khách tự lái xe đến và từ khách sạn một cách dễ dàng. Nếu du khách không muốn tự lái, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ taxi, giúp du khách di chuyển một cách tiện lợi và an toàn. Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một địa điểm lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá Hạ Long và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị với các tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng và chuyên nghiệp.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực. Khách sạn cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng, đảm bảo mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Khách sạn có nhà hàng phục vụ suốt 24 giờ, đảm bảo bạn luôn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon mọi lúc mà không cần phải ra khỏi phòng. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng cũng được cung cấp suốt 24 giờ, giúp bạn có thể gọi món ăn ngon trực tiếp tại phòng của mình.

Chọn phòng tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cung cấp nhiều loại phòng để bạn lựa chọn. Phòng Deluxe King với diện tích 38 mét vuông và 1 giường King Bed. Phòng Deluxe King Ocean View cũng có diện tích 38 mét vuông và 1 giường King Bed nhưng lại mang đến cho bạn tầm nhìn hướng biển tuyệt đẹp. Nếu bạn muốn chọn phòng với 2 giường đơn, hãy chọn phòng Deluxe Twin Room với diện tích 38 mét vuông. Nếu bạn thích ngắm nhìn biển từ phòng, phòng Deluxe Twin with Sea View sẽ là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo với diện tích 38 mét vuông và 2 giường đơn. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm sang trọng và rộng rãi hơn, hãy chọn Executive Suite Sea View với diện tích 76 mét vuông và 1 giường Super King Bed. Đặt phòng tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long qua Agoda sẽ mang lại cho bạn giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, không cần lo lắng về thủ tục phức tạp.

Khám phá vẻ đẹp Hạ Long tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long tọa lạc tại một trong những điểm đẹp nhất của Việt Nam - vịnh Hạ Long. Với vẻ đẹp hùng vĩ của những dãy núi đá kỳ vĩ và những hòn đảo nổi tiếng trên biển xanh ngát, khu vực này thu hút hàng triệu du khách mỗi năm. Khách sạn nằm trên bãi biển Bãi Cháy, cho phép du khách tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh và tận hưởng những bình minh và hoàng hôn tuyệt đẹp.

Ngoài việc thưởng thức vẻ đẹp thiên nhiên tuyệt vời, du khách cũng có thể dễ dàng khám phá những điểm tham quan nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Cách Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long chỉ vài phút đi bằng xe là quý khách có thể tới Công viên Quốc gia Hạ Long, nơi có những hang động đẹp như Thiên Cung và Đầu Gỗ. Du khách cũng có thể tham gia các hoạt động như đi thuyền kayak, lặn biển để khám phá vẻ đẹp đáy biển và tham quan các làng chài truyền thống.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay gần Hạ Long đến Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời nằm tại Hạ Long, Việt Nam. Để đến được Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long từ sân bay, bạn có một số lựa chọn vận chuyển tiện lợi và dễ dàng.

Một lựa chọn phổ biến là sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón sân bay. Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay chất lượng cao, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức. Bạn có thể đặt trước dịch vụ này qua trang web hoặc liên hệ trực tiếp với nhân viên của khu nghỉ dưỡng.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng taxi hoặc xe ô tô cá nhân để đi từ sân bay đến Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long. Điều này sẽ mang lại sự linh hoạt và tiện lợi cho bạn trong việc di chuyển. Hãy nhớ kiểm tra giá cước trước khi đi để tránh bị đánh giá quá cao. Với bất kỳ phương tiện nào bạn chọn, hãy chuẩn bị sẵn sàng để trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan xung quanh Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long tọa lạc gần một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị và độc đáo trong chuyến du lịch của mình. Một trong số đó là Hang Đầu Gỗ, nổi tiếng với kiến trúc độc đáo và hệ thống đèn sáng tạo nên một không gian thần tiên. Du khách cũng có thể khám phá Khu vui chơi giải trí Sun World Hạ Long, nơi có nhiều trò chơi thú vị và cảnh quan đẹp mắt. 

Ngoài ra, Công viên Rồng cũng là một điểm đến hấp dẫn, với những đài phun nước và cảnh quan xanh mát. Du khách cũng có thể khám phá những hòn đảo xinh đẹp như Hòn Cam, Hòn Sói Rừng, Hòn Na và Hòn Sỉnh, nơi mang đến cho du khách những bãi biển hoang sơ và không gian yên tĩnh. Đảo Vĩnh Thực cũng là một điểm đến thú vị, với những bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và cảnh quan hùng vĩ. Trạm Y tế Thị trấn Trới cũng nằm gần Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long, đảm bảo an ninh và sức khỏe cho du khách khi cần thiết. Hòn Tây Hoi cũng là một điểm đến thú vị, nơi du khách có thể tham quan và tận hưởng không gian biển tuyệt đẹp.

Ga Hạ Long - Trạm giao thông công cộng xung quanh Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long tọa lạc gần Ga Hạ Long, một trong những trạm giao thông công cộng quan trọng nhất ở Hạ Long, Việt Nam. Với vị trí thuận lợi này, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến và đi từ resort bằng xe buýt hoặc tàu hỏa. Ga Hạ Long cung cấp nhiều tuyến đường đi khác nhau, giúp du khách khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng trong khu vực.

Nằm cách Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long chỉ khoảng 1,5 km, Ga Hạ Long là điểm dừng chính trên tuyến xe buýt số 14, kết nối với các điểm đến quan trọng như Bãi Cháy, Tuần Châu và Trung tâm thành phố Hạ Long. Du khách có thể dễ dàng tìm thấy xe buýt và tiến hành chuyến đi khám phá đầy thú vị trong khu vực.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long nằm trong khu vực có nhiều nhà hàng hấp dẫn. Bạn có thể thưởng thức các món BBQ tuyệt vời tại Papa's BBQ Restaurant hoặc thưởng thức một ly cà phê thơm ngon tại Rock King Coffee Koi. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực địa phương, hãy đến Thuy Chung Restaurant để thưởng thức các món ăn truyền thống. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức một bữa tối sang trọng, hãy đến Soul Bowl tại Citadines Marina Ha Long hoặc Sakurajima Corner. Eco Cafe cung cấp không gian yên tĩnh và thân thiện, là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức một ly cà phê vào buổi sáng. On The Rocks tại Citadines Marina Halong là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực đa dạng. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm một chuyến du thuyền ngắn ngày, hãy tham gia Halong One Day Cruise. Nếu bạn thích pizza, hãy đến 14 Pizza Halong để thưởng thức những chiếc pizza thơm ngon. Summaul Korean Restaurant là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Hàn Quốc tuyệt vời.

Trung tâm mua sắm tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long nằm gần các trung tâm mua sắm phổ biến như Chợ đêm Hạ Long, Hạ Long Marine Plaza và Trung tâm Thương mại Bãi Cháy. Du khách có thể dễ dàng tìm thấy những cửa hàng, quầy bán hàng và gian hàng đa dạng tại những địa điểm này. Chợ đêm Hạ Long là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá và mua sắm các sản phẩm địa phương, từ đồ thủ công mỹ nghệ cho đến đặc sản độc đáo. Hạ Long Marine Plaza cung cấp một trải nghiệm mua sắm hiện đại với các cửa hàng thời trang, siêu thị và nhà hàng. Trung tâm Thương mại Bãi Cháy cũng là một điểm đến phổ biến với nhiều cửa hàng bách hóa, cửa hàng điện tử và quán ăn ngon. Với vị trí thuận lợi của nó, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một điểm dừng chân lý tưởng cho du khách muốn thỏa sức mua sắm và khám phá văn hóa địa phương.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long so với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố Hạ Long

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ sang trọng và đẳng cấp tại Hạ Long, Việt Nam. Với giá phòng trung bình chỉ $101, đây là một sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những người muốn tiết kiệm chi phí mà vẫn được tận hưởng những tiện ích và dịch vụ chất lượng cao. So với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố Hạ Long là $241, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long mang đến một sự đáng giá tuyệt vời cho khách hàng.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

Khách sạn này thật tuyệt vời. Nhân viên thân thiện, tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp và rất sạch sẽ. Bể bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn và sạch sẽ mang lại thời gian tuyệt vời cho gia đình tôi, đặc biệt bé yêu thích nó rất nhiều. Phòng và tiện nghi thật đẹp và nhân viên thật sự tốt bụng và thân thiện. Vị trí đẹp tuyệt vời, tầm nhìn không thể tin được và khu đất đẹp. Xin cảm ơn vì kỳ nghỉ thư giãn và vui vẻ! Phòng rất sạch sẽ và nhân viên rất chu đáo. Tôi sẽ giới thiệu cho gia đình và bạn bè của mình. Bữa sáng tốt.

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long: Khách hàng hài lòng với đánh giá tích cực

Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long là một điểm đến tuyệt vời để trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ. Khách hàng đã đưa ra những đánh giá tích cực về khách sạn này với tổng điểm 9.0 trên 10.0. Điểm cao nhất được ghi nhận cho sự sạch sẽ (9.3), tiện nghi (9.1) và thoải mái (9.5).

Khách sạn Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long được đánh giá cao về tiện nghi với điểm số 9.1. Với các tiện ích hiện đại như hồ bơi, spa, phòng tập thể dục và nhà hàng, khách sạn đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng. Bạn sẽ có cơ hội thư giãn và tận hưởng những dịch vụ chất lượng cao tại đây.

Đánh giá cho vị trí của Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long cũng rất cao, đạt điểm số 9.0. Khách sạn nằm ở vị trí thuận lợi, gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng và chỉ cách bãi biển Hạ Long vài bước chân. Với vị trí đắc địa như vậy, khách hàng có thể dễ dàng khám phá vẻ đẹp của Hạ Long và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại đây.

sample_comments.text:
Tuyệt vời ở mọi khía cạnh.

Đây là nơi lưu trú tuyệt nhất mang vẻ đẹp của vịnh Hạ Long.
Nhà hàng cũng rất đẹp và thức ăn ngon.
Điều kiện phòng và các tiện ích đều tuyệt vời,
Hồ bơi, xông hơi và phòng gym cũng được sử dụng miễn phí, thật tuyệt vời.

Cảm ơn sự nỗ lực và công sức của tất cả các nhân viên.
Tôi ủng hộ tương lai tươi sáng và tuyệt vời của những người trẻ trung, trung thành với vai trò của mình.

sample_comments.negatives: no customer service, everyone too busy, late checking in due to room not being ready,same food daily, cold coffee, broken safe, door not closed after the daily clean one day so could have had everything taken! pool bar poorly stocked ( no Jacks!!)

sample_comments.text: Thật sự Vinpearl không làm tôi thất vọng. Đây là khách sạn tốt nhất với sự riêng tư trên đảo dành riêng cho khách sạn, thân thiện và sạch sẽ. Chỉ có điều, liệu việc tôi đặt phòng Deluxe với tầm nhìn hồ bơi biển có phải là do vấn đề giao tiếp giữa trang web đặt phòng Agoda và khách sạn không? Tôi được phân phòng ở tầng 1 với tầm nhìn vườn, có một chút trục trặc trong việc phân phòng, nhưng họ đã lắng nghe ý kiến của tôi và tôi cảm thấy hài lòng. Đây là một khách sạn tốt.
sample_comments.title: Nhà hàng ngon với view biển Vinpearl
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for your kind review and for choosing Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our facilities, cleanliness, and the private island experience. Your kind words about our team are truly appreciated.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience regarding your room allocation. Differences in booking information between third-party platforms such as Agoda and the hotel can occasionally occur, and we regret any confusion caused.

We are pleased to know that our team was able to assist and resolve the matter to your satisfaction.

Thank you once again for your understanding and support. We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Tran Nguyen Yen Thi (Ms.)
Director Of Operations

sample_comments.positives: The executive king suite we booked gave us access to its rooftop balcony with a breathtaking, million-dollar view of the famous Halong Bay. This is a bonus which was not featured in the room photos at all. Just book it, you wonÂ¿t regret the decision.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing Stay Despite the Vinpearl Brand
sample_comments.text:
The resort is located away from the mainland, which means once you're there, you are completely dependent on the property for food and basic needs. Unfortunately, outside food or drinks are not allowed, which becomes frustrating given the limited dining flexibility.
Restaurants close very early (9:30 PM). Even though we tried to place an order at 9:20 PM, it was flatly refused. For a luxury resort, this is extremely disappointing and leaves guests with no options late in the evening.
One very unpleasant experience was with housekeeping. At around 7:00 AM, cleaning staff banged loudly on our door, so aggressively that it felt like an earthquake. We were genuinely scared and shocked to be woken up this way. This shows a complete lack of training and respect for guest privacy.
The rooms are average and do not match the premium pricing. Overall, the property is not well maintained---it feels dated and poorly managed in several areas. The beach is not clean, which further reduces the charm of a seaside resort.
The only real positive was the indoor heated swimming pool, which was enjoyable and well maintained.
Overall, this resort does not live up to the Vinpearl brand promise. With better maintenance, staff training, flexible dining hours, and improved beach cleanliness, it could be much better---but in its current state, it is not worth the price.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review of your recent stay at the resort.
I feel extremely sorry on your poor experience. Definitely your comment will be delivered to review by our team for immediate improvement. Once again, I would like to apologize for your inconveniences you've experienced during your staying and I do believe it will be amazing staying for your next staying. 

We do hope we will get a chance to welcome you again soon!

Best regards,
Nguyen Thi Hai Yen
Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Not for people looking for a relaxing getaway
sample_comments.positives: The rooms were nice and the resort is beautiful
sample_comments.negatives: The families with screaming kids made it a terrible experience. Constantly running up and down the halls, shouting all night. From late at night to early in the morning, parents and kids were shouting in the halls, made it very difficult to sleep at all. No such thing as "quiet hours" here. The only time there wasn't running and yelling in the hallways and rooms was when the families were all down at the pool (still screaming there, of course). It felt more like living inside an amusement park than a hotel. Bottom line: if you're looking for a relaxing and restful vacation - go somewhere else.

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.positives: size of outdoor pool and great having an indoor pool too
sample_comments.negatives: no customer service, everyone too busy, late checking in due to room not being ready,same food daily, cold coffee, broken safe, door not closed after the daily clean one day so could have had everything taken! pool bar poorly stocked ( no Jacks!!)

We sincerely regret that we were unable to meet your expectations during your stay. We hope to have the opportunity to offer you more detailed guidance in the future, enabling you to select a room type that better suits your preferences.
We look forward to another opportunity to host you at our Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long.

Warm regards,
Dzung Dinh Viet
Front Office Manager
Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

sample_comments.title: Aussie opinion must read!!!
sample_comments.negatives:
I recently stayed here for my honeymoon, and while the views were absolutely amazing, the overall experience was extremely disappointing. The customer service was consistently poor, and I had to triple-check every bill because staff repeatedly forgot to apply the 30% discount that was included in my booking. I was also charged 1,445,000 VND around $85 AUD for laundry (6 pairs of briefs, 6 t-shirts, and 2 pairs of men's shorts), which was never explained properly we got told it was per 5 items not per item and far above reasonable pricing also had a voucher there which was never added to the final bill.

Our booking also included vouchers that we never received, adding to the feeling of disorganisation the WhatsApp lady confusing us even more making bookings through her and then turning up to the venue with no booking made.

Because the resort had so few guests, they would pick and choose which restaurants were open, and the buffet was never as advertised, with limited selections and reduced quality. It genuinely felt like facilities were being cut back without telling anyone prices and the place of the buffet changed each night.

Another frustrating detail was seeing staff using the pools while guests were trying to relax, which felt very unprofessional. Room service showed up at 9am and were extremely noisy, making it hard to enjoy a slow morning especially if you have just travelled a massive distance the day before. Our room door stopped working randomly while they did fix it, it just added to the ongoing frustrations.

It honestly got to the point where, after going to the mainland, we didn't even want to get back on the boat to return to the island which was sad as the place is absolutely stunning to look at. This left a really disappointing mark on what was supposed to be our honeymoon, especially compared to the other places we stayed which were much cheaper, far better service, and much better value.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Secluded location on its own island. Convenience boats to get to the mainland 24/7. Staff are attentive and friendly. Architecture and decor are beautiful.
sample_comments.negatives: Spa's staff was rude.

sample_comments.title: DO NOT COME HERE
sample_comments.text: My family was very excited to stay here & we've been disappointed on literally every aspect since we've arrived. The best part of the hotel is that it's on its own island. The amenities, staff, cleanliness, & facilities were disappointing. Our rooms were dirty when we arrived, the sheets weren't changed, we found a half eaten piece of meat on the nightstand and hair on the bed. It was just an overpriced nightmare. When we addressed concerns with the staff they were either rude or uncaring. It seems as this hotel is set up to make money & that's it's. They have no desire to care for their guests. Please do yourself a favor & stay literally anywhere else or if you do please set the bar the lowest you possibly can.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs. Helen,

Thank you for choosing Vinpearl Resort and Spa Ha Long for your recent vacation in Vietnam. 
Thank you for your helpful feedback as it shown us which points needed to be improved to satisfy our valued guests like you. Guest's satisfaction is our first priority, and it is only through your valuable feedback that we can improve our service and facilities.
We hope to having a chance to welcome you back to Vinpearl Ha Long in the near future and showing you our improvement.

Best regards,
Hotel Management Team

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Really bizarre atmosphere. Halong was empty and littered with abandoned building projects. The hotel was also more or less empty. It felt like an attempt at high class luxury without the staff ever having previously been to a luxury hotel. The pool area was beautiful but the feeling we got while being there was very strange.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The executive king suite we booked gave us access to its rooftop balcony with a breathtaking, million-dollar view of the famous Halong Bay. This is a bonus which was not featured in the room photos at all. Just book it, you wonÂ¿t regret the decision.

sample_comments.title: Not a good option.
sample_comments.text:
4 nights at this resort. To get straight to the point, it's not worth it. Go to another resort in Ha Long city.

This resort is not family-friendly. At the time of booking, Agoda was running a promotion offering free accommodation for up to two children under 12. I made a mistake by not including the children in the party during the booking process, but according to Agoda's policy, I couldn't correct this mistake afterwards. While contacting the resort, I found out that they were also running their own promotion allowing free stays for children if booked directly through them at that time.

Despite exchanging dozens of emails with the hotel, they remained adamant that since the children were not included in the initial booking, I had to pay for their stay. I even provided several screenshots that I took during the booking process to compare rate conditions, but it was of no use.

Although the amount wasn't large, considering the countless things you can do with that money in Vietnam, it could be significant. It was certainly an unpleasant way to start a vacation. I have never seen such strict charges for children, who are part of the family, at other destinations, which was surprising.

However, this disappointment was the smallest among the many I experienced at this so-called top-notch resort. First of all, the fact that this resort is on an island is very inconvenient. Half of the time, you will feel like you arrived at the dock just after the boat had left. After waiting 10-15 minutes, we had to compete with rude those tourists to get on the boat. They have no concept of lining up or avoiding cutting in line, and unfortunately, this resort is full of those tourists.

Even when you get off the island, the area around the dock is very desolate. Compared to the bustling Ha Long City, this area feels like a graveyard. Moreover, walking around is very inconvenient because of the dogs roaming without leashes, so you have to take a taxi to get anywhere.

You might think, "We'll just stay inside the resort," but the amenities are lacking compared to other Vinpearl resorts. There is only one swimming pool and a narrow private beach. The restaurant and room service menus are not diverse and are too Westernized, offering limited choices. Why is it Westernized when most of the tourists are Chinese? It's puzzling.

The housekeeping quality is also below expectations. Even after housekeeping was done, the bathroom remained dirty. It felt like they hurried through dry cleaning to avoid dealing with the humidity.

Communicating in English was also difficult. We decided to use an extra bed after seeing the room and informed the reception that we wouldn't use it, yet an hour later, the extra bed arrived in our room. It took two hours for ice to arrive after we requested it, and once it didn't arrive at all. Bellboys took a long time and were inaccurate when transporting luggage to and from the island. We often found ourselves waiting for luggage either at our room or when arriving on the mainland.

Ultimately, the only accurate services at this hotel were room service, pool bar usage, and additional child charges. They provided a very precise bill for these, which we paid. 

Making money is good, but remember that you are in the business of handling someone's vacation. Making them happy is practically everything.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Our Valued Guest DO,

Warmly welcome from Vinpearl Resort and Spa Ha Long.

On behalf of Resort management board, we are truly sorry for this inconvenience that happen after your stay. Our resort always try our best to ensure you having an enjoyable experience, and it is apparent in this case that we fell short. 

Furthermore, we truly appreciate your constructive information regarding the reception service with the unsettled surcharge policy, the location which caused you inconvenience coming in and out of the islan, and the delayed service. We truly understanding that this is a learning curve for us to improve our services every day.

Thank you, once again, for highlighting these issues. Representing the brand of Vinpearl, we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to our resort in the future for a true Vinpearl experience.

Best Regards,
Dzung Dinh Viet
Front Office Manager
Vinpearl Resort & Spa Halong team

sample_comments.positives: Nice property and room.
sample_comments.negatives: Food and restaurants were disappointing, expected better quality. Also, the air pollution and haziness were awful during both days of our stay.

sample_comments.title: Terrible. Do not stay here if you like to sleep.

The room we paid for was "ocean view", yet when we were given our rooms it was facing back to the mainland. I was not able to sleep at all because of the lights and music coming from the mainland. The gym area is very small and the equipment is limited. The sauna, spa and locker rooms was damp and smelt horrible. I wouldn't recommend staying if you are looking for a relaxing holiday.

sample_comments.title: Fair enough
sample_comments.positives: My stay at Vinpearl Resort Ha Long Bay was a mixed experience. The location was fantastic, offering stunning views of the bay, and the staff was friendly and accommodating. However, I couldn't help but notice that the hotel itself was showing signs of age and wear. The need for renovation was evident in various aspects of the property, from the outdated decor to the worn-out facilities. While the cleanliness was maintained, the overall ambiance left something to be desired. With a renovation, this resort has the potential to shine even brighter and provide an even more enjoyable stay for its guests.
sample_comments.negatives: Another aspect to consider is that there seemed to be limited halal dining options available, which could be a limitation for some guests.

sample_comments.title: Not as good as it looks
sample_comments.text: This hotel clearly took care of their Asian guests as talking English seemed to be a chore for them. Buffet food wasn't great. The guests are so rude and inconsiderate and it is SO noisy as there is no soundproofing in rooms. The beach was nice but you couldn't swim in one of them for an unknown reason. There is no where you can buy snacks or sunscreen etc. so you have to go into town to get it which is annoying if you just want to relax. Their drink and food variety is minimal and very expensive. We stayed for our honeymoon and they gave us a cake, bottle of wine and decorated our room which was nice. Other than that the place needed some real improvement.

Thank you for taking the time to respond and please accept our sincere apologies for the unpleasant experience that you had during your stay in our resort. Your comments are highly appreciated as they have highlighted areas where we have to place more attention as to improve our service.
We hope this will not deter you from trying Vinpearl again in the future, you will enjoy your vacation as well as we will do our best to make it better.

Yours faithfully,
Hotel Management Team

Noone I met from staff was capable in English, but even using translation apps, it was still very clunky. I would probably call is 1-2 star service with a 5 star building.

 The water pressure in the showers was too weak can't take a good shower. The heating didn't work only AC was on but it was kinda cold during our stay. And they tried to charge us for free waters too. Allowing only 2 bottles per day but we had 2 adults 2 kids! After making another complaint they eventually gave us 2 bottles more for free. I mean... It's just water VIN Pearl don't be so cheap!

We were leaving with mostly uncomfortable feelings rather than sarisfied unfortunately. That was my last thought when leaving.

I have mixed feelings about this resort. One one hand, it is beautifully appointed and the facilities are generally excellent, as is the food. However, while the location may seem idyllic there are some detriments 
1. It is somewhat in the middle of nowhere in relation to the rest of the city
2. There are fixed times to go back and forth from the island to the mainland so if you miss the boat you wait another half hour
3. The beach is a small area roped off, the water does not look clean at all. 

 Lastly, Being an English speaking Canadian was not easy. I was injured at the hotel because of some hidden step in the public bathroom (yes there is one) and it was hard to communicate with the staff over it.

From the crowd it really looks like an idyllic place for families with children

They sent an engineer but he didn't know what to do and just laughed when I told him the Internet will eventually come back after 5-20 minutes. The Italian restaurant had a nice server but she never checked back with us after we got our food. I had a medical emergency and needed to come home early and asked if they can make an exception to adjust the room reservation even though it was non-refundable. I was asking for an exception since I had submitted documents of why I needed to leave early. They only offered credits to the hotel which did not help my situation. Kind of hard being on an island hotel where they also don't allow you to bring outside food on to the island. The pillows were too high so I asked for thinner pillows. The ones they sent up were thinner but really hard so we were not able to use them. My husband is 6'1 and the king size measurements did not appear to be king size but they said that is up to their standards. Then the safe stopped working and needed a battery charge. They fixed it but it took time waiting for the engineer to show up for the Internet and the safe. We tossed and turned a lot and didn't get a good nights sleep. The property is nice. I recommend it when the weather is better.

sample_comments.title: True luxury
sample_comments.positives:
Without a doubt, the best hotel I stayed in. This was my second time staying there and both times it's been an absolutely outstanding experience from start to finish.

The entire property is stunning. The outdoor pools are simply breathtaking, and the overall design and aesthetics of the resort create a truly relaxing and luxurious atmosphere. Everything feels thoughtfully curated and beautifully maintained.

The rooms overlooking the sea are a highlight... waking up to that view every day was something special. The staff were equally impressive: professional, attentive, and consistently warm, making us feel genuinely welcome throughout our stay.

Dining was another standout. The views from the restaurants, especially the Pavilion Restaurant, were incredible and elevated the whole experience even further.

One of the most unique touches is the boat transfer to the resort, it really sets the tone for a premium, almost exclusive getaway from the moment you arrive.

To top it all off, we received a 30% discount on all meals through Booking.com Genius rewards, which made the experience even better value for money.

Overall, this was true 5-star treatment in every sense. I would highly recommend Vinpearl Resort and would happily return again.

sample_comments.text: We travelled 6 adults and 3 younger children . Great pickle ball courts and 1 tennis court. Pavillion restaurant was lovely . Tables and bathroom doors were dirty. For such a 5 star facility their cleaning needs to do better . Other than the small stuff our suite was great . Family had a great stay. Worth extra money to make memorable . Court fees were 500k for the hour including racquet rentals .

sample_comments.title: Nice but not perfect for a five star hotel
sample_comments.text:
The Vinpearl at Ha long Bay is a resort on its own private island. The hotel is a beautiful and elegant building with an uninterrupted view of the limestone islands. Its numerous private beaches are clean & peaceful and it has a number of good sized swimming pools to choose from. The staff are friendly and always willing to help and we had a great massage at the spa as you would expect at a 5* resort.

Unfortunately, there were a few things that let it down including those that it can fix and those it probably cannot.

Those it can:
- At check-in we weren't given any details such as the times for breakfast/dinner or any activities that it has to offer.
- We had to go get our bags when we first arrived as they weren't brought to our room.
- The food quality in their a la carte restaurant (pavilion) was poor. Our seafood fried rice contain hardly any seafood and the pizza we ordered would be identical to the ones you get as part of the all inclusive option.
- Two of our choices from the wine list they did not have and it arrived at our table after our food.
- The quality of the food in the all inclusive options was OK but not great.
- The hotel can get rather hot and in our room (552) the AC was not working very well.
- The minibar in the room was not cold enough and didn't have any alcohol. Unless you go to the pool bar, there is no where to relax or to be entertained. They had a band play in the evenings but they would be drowned out by the noise from the crowds, and the bar in the entrance area didn't have any ambience.
- Given the size of the gym, there aren't that many weight related pieces of equipment.

Those it cannot:
- It seems everyone descends on the Bayview restaurant at the same time and so it is extremely busy. It is impossible to have a relaxing dinner unless you go at 9:30pm as it is so chaotic and noisy with kids running riot.
- I saw children try food with the serving spoons and then proceed to put them back into the dishes.
- Rather than take a sel

Our room looked out to the ocean and I'm sure the view would have been great had it not been for the rain. The room was spacious and clean. Breakfast was great, with a wide selection to choose from.

Our only discomfort was when a shift manager/staff member (tall guy with glasses, kind of geeky looking) came over and sat down at the table next to us for his coffee break. We thought that was strange, but then he started taking VERY loud and exaggerated sips of his coffee at 10 seconds intervals until he finished his coffee. He then proceeded to lounge back in his chair for awhile before leaving.

My wife said he was actually standing around sipping his coffee before he came to sit down next to us. We tried to ignore him but it was hard not to notice his antics.

Overall, the facilities were 5 star. The staff were generally friendly and the service was good, however perhaps not 5 star as we had expected. Perhaps some staff need further training.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic stay!
sample_comments.positives:
I absolutely loved this hotel! It was everything a hotel should be and great value for money. My room had ocean view overlooking Halong Bay. It was fantastic although the weather was quite gloomy. Not sure if it was pollution or just cloudy. The room was quiet. I had the most comfortable bed with the best pillows I have ever had in a hotel (and I travel a lot). I loved the HOT shower too and that the room also had a bathtub.
My phone did not charge so I was using an outlet downstairs. One of the staff noticed and sent a charger up to my room without me having to ask. A very nice gesture.
Everything was clearly marked. The indoor swimming pool was luxury and about 28m long! Both the women and men's dressing rooms near the swimming pool have their own private jacuzzi, sauna and steam room for free use! I also had a spa treatment which was also amazing!
The breakfast options were fabulous with a wide variety for all tastes and cultures.

I ate a hamburger at one of the restaurants. Although the beef was good, the bacon was hard and full of fat which I had to take out. Otherwise, overall good quality of food.

The staff were amazing and very helpful.
The speedboats run every 20 minutes (takes 3-5 min) 24 hours which is fantastic!
Would definitely come back in a heartbeat!

There is a massive cleanup for the plastic pollution in the water at Halong Bay. I was pleasantly surprised to have only seen 3 pieces of trash floating next to the shore. This was something I was very worried about. I stayed at the hotel and went for a day trip cruise and that was perfect!
sample_comments.negatives:
A few thoughts to consider:

The water bottles are located in the bathroom- so almost missed them! Better to put them in the sleeping area next to the information sheets and menu.

Housekeeping should check the shampoo, conditioner and body wash bottles to make sure they are working properly. The conditioner was not coming out and I asked for it to be refilled. It was, but it still did not come out.. Upon further inspection, the tube inside was blocked so once cleaned out, it worked perfectly!

It is absolutely fine to ask guests to write a review. However, when one is asked to write a good review or rate the hotel as a 10, this leaves a very bad taste. This is an honest review, but something to be cautious of when guests are checking out.

sample_comments.title: This was truly five stars experience.Perfect location,
sample_comments.positives:
The location is just amazing. This is right where you would want to be when going to see Ha long Bay as you are staying there. The staff goes above and beyond to listen and work towards making the guests feel welcome. At every step(reception, guest enrollment, service, restaurant) it seems everyone is wanting to see how they can help. It was a five star experience.Some special mentions- we loved the service at the buffet. To cater to vegetarian, the actually made customized food(Pho, veg fried rice etc) and brought it out for us
The staff were so considerate and nice and understanding.Buffet staff mentions who really stood out and nice(along with others- cam van,thanh Thao ,tu linh.)

At the reception, Bach Duong and trung Duong and my hung were so helpful. They organized taxi and as it is very difficult in finding people who understand English, My hung became our point of contact to order taxi around the Ha long bay area.

The food and view at the Pavilion restaurant was just amazing.
I just loved the mystery laundry bag scheme. Thank you Vinpearl. We got all our cloths washed at such a reasonable price and sent back in 3 hours(we gave soiled cloths at 5p and amazed to see them back at 8pm)
sample_comments.negatives: Staff is amazing however it becomes difficult communicating as some struggle with English. They are so willing to help and want to go out of their way. I feel the resort/ business can give them classes/ interpreting solutions. That will only help bring more business . If tourists are easily able to communicate they might use more services offered

sample_comments.title: 5 Star hotel with limited resturant options.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is exceptionally clean and great location. My concern was having only one indoor restaurant (Bay View), exclusive to a buffet charging $50 per plate for every meal (breakfast was free). If you wanted to order any food, then you were stuck outside at the Pavilion outdoor restaurant freezing you butt off in the wind, cold and rain (Typical January). It was 10 degrees Celsius outside at 90% humidity with 50 km/h winds the equivalent to -10 in Canada. The Kyoto restaurant is not available because you need to be VIP or several other made up excuses (although the tables were setup and ready to go). We ended up having room service several times, instead of freezing outside waiting 2 hours for our lunch or dinner and still spending $75 on two plates (the meal gets cold fast). The hotel is militant on which restaurants are able to serve food at certain times which usually equated to only one option the outdoor restaurant! Second concern was being locked out of my room twice and not initially being upgraded to pool view when I had purchased the upgrade prior to arrival (this took 4 hours to correct). Ocean view room are any room above the 4th floor, when in actuality almost ever room is an ocean view room.Staff appeared afraid to make decisions and hesitated frequently to resolve a concern quickly (except to informing you that the only indoor restaurant is strictly buffet only). The indoor pool was exceptional and the coffee bar fantastic (included with your breakfast). The buffet had incredible variety and great food quality but at $100 for 2 people seemed excessively priced (at least it was never busy for lunch or dinner). Staff were always friendly and spoke reasonable English. The hotel needs to revisit it's winter dinning guidelines to accommodate guests desiring a menu ordered indoors meal available anytime between 6 am to 10 pm instead of just a overpriced buffet at the Bay View.

sample_comments.title: A Relaxing Luxury Getaway with Stunning Ha Long Bay Views
sample_comments.text:
Vinpearl Resort is a very well maintained resort with friendly staff and excellent facilities. The water sports activities were great, the pool is absolutely humongous, and having pickleball courts was a fantastic bonus. The spa was also fabulous and perfect for relaxing after a day of activities.

We spent two days there with full board, and the food selection was extensive with plenty of variety across all meals.

The resort is reached by boat, with transfers running every 30 minutes around the clock, which made everything very convenient. It is a wonderful getaway with beautiful views of the limestone formations across Ha Long Bay. If you are looking for a bit more atmosphere outside the resort, there are also plenty of beach bars along the mainland coast nearby.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a wonderful review of your stay with us.

We are delighted to learn that you enjoyed our facilities, particularly the water sports activities, swimming pool, pickleball courts, and spa. It is also pleasing to know that the full-board dining experience, convenient boat transfers, and the breathtaking views of Ha Long Bay all contributed to a memorable getaway.

Your kind words regarding the resort's upkeep and our team are greatly appreciated and will be shared with our team.

We look forward to welcoming you back to Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long for another relaxing stay in the future.

Kind Regards,
Tran Nguyen Yen Thi (Mrs.)
Director Of Operations

The location, facilities, staff etc were great, but the hotel is starting to look a little tired in parts and prob not quite the five star it claims - but it's also very busy which is quite a shock after being on a boat with much smaller pax numbers - so much so that there were kids running up and down corridors until late at night etc.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
El hotel es muy bonito y precioso, la arquitectura es impresionante, un hotel elevado encima de una pequeña isla con sus playas privadas y sus piscinas. Fabuloso. Y el equipo super amable la verdad, y muy paciente. ﻿ ﻿El wifi está bueno cuando está conectado y como lo tienes que conectar todos los dos por tres pues no ayuda a tener una buena conexión. .﻿El restaurante de fuera, sobre islotes, es súper interesante y fue una sorpresa para nosotros, se ve que al jefe de cocina le encanta su trabajo, gustos interesantes y precio razonable al precio del buffet. También si quieres picar algo en la piscina, la carta no está mal y los smoothies son muy buenos. ﻿ También si os gusta dormir con calor hay que preguntar porque todas las habitaciones no lo tienen. También hay que preguntar qué al momento que vais a venir vivir la experiencia de este hotel, no hay reformas, porque da igual que pagas o no, ya pueden hacer ruido tapando por la mañana. 
﻿por suerte cada vez que te pasa algo hacen todo para rectificar la situación, o darte algo de compensación. Y esta muy bien pero nosotros hemos tenido demasiadas cosas en poco tiempo y es una lastima. Tienen siempre la sonrisa y la educación esto no lo podemos negar. Así que gracias a ellos para probar de hacérnoslos pasar lo mejor posible. Volvería sin dudas pero cuando hayan arreglado estos detalles que te pueden molestar.
sample_comments.negatives: Pero les falta mucho para entender al cliente. No somos maquinas de dinero, hacen pagar las bolas y raquetas de tenis más el terreno es un poco vergonzoso por un 5 estrellas, nunca había visto esto y bueno no hablo de mi cita de la peluquería que casi me destruye el pelo. ﻿Por lo de los restaurantes, no hay nada de otro mundo y algo seguro que lo que enseñan en las fotos, no tiene nada que ver con lo que tendréis. El buffet principal es básico y caro por lo que es, no lo recomiendo porque es más caro que a la carta!! No hay restaurantes típico japonés como lo dicen en la descripción.﻿ También te pueden preguntar más dinero para tener la vista al océano, pero no hay que olvidar que es una isla, al final está el océano todo alrededor del hotel. ﻿ Hay un tour de barco en el hotel, pensábamos que fuera diferente pero no, es el mismo tour que los de internet o los que puedes encontrar en una tienda. O sea, eres solo dinero. Va todo rápido, en el barco las bebidas las tienes que pagar igual el agua durante la comida, y la comida pues es una vergüenza también. No les cuesta absolutamente nada pero tú pagas caro. También hay que saber que hay muchísima gente, no es agradable y llegamos al mismo momento que todos los otros tour al mismo lugar, para decir que para disfrutar de esta maravilla del mundo, es complicado. Si tenéis la oportunidad y el dinero mejor un tour privado con vuestro barco así podrías ir donde queréis y al momento que queréis.

sample_comments.title: Un hôtel idéalement situé face à la baie d'Halong, parfait pour les familles avec enfants. Confort optimal, vue splendid
sample_comments.positives:
Emplacement et cadre: 
L'hôtel est situé sur une petite ile face à la baie d'Halong, offrant un cadre exceptionnel et une vue spectaculaire.

Chambre et confort:
La suite exécutive est spacieuse, confortable, idéale pour une famille avec enfants, avec une grande salle de bain et une vue à couper le souffle.

Services & facilité:
Check-in rapide, navette bateau 24h/24 gratuite, ce qui rend le séjour simple et pratique.

Restauration:
Buffet du petit-déjeuner et du déjeuner très variés et délicieux.

Infrastructures:
Superbe piscine extérieure, piscine intérieure agréable, belle salle de sport, et une magnifique plage de sable blanc juste en face de la baie.

Kids club et personnel:
Kids club très beau et bien équipé. 
Le personnel de la réception parlant un anglais parfait, facilitant la communication. (Rare au Vietnam)
sample_comments.negatives:
Vraiment pas grand chose et rien de bien important mais :

Décoration et état des chambres :
Intérieur montrant quelques signes d'usure malgré un bon confort et beau look général.

Restauration:
Le diner est très mal organisé, avec un système de buffet partiellement servi à table, ce qui cause confusion et frustration. Les desserts en général ne sont vraiment pas bons !! 

Communication:
Les gentilles animatrices du kids club ne parlent ni anglais ni français, rendant la communication difficile pour les enfants européens. Pareil à la piscine.

sample_comments.title: Save Money on Your Room and Spend More on Services
sample_comments.text: The 3 meal combo is worth getting. The buffet has plenty of options and the food quality is decent. I booked the Executive Suite thinking it would be a step above, but the experience didn't match what I got at other resorts. A standard room would have done just fine. sample_comments.title: Vinpearl Hạ Long
sample_comments.text: Khu resort rất phù hợp với gia đình có trẻ nhỏ hoặc nhóm khách du lịch có nhu cầu nghỉ ngơi là chính. Cở sở vật chất rất tốt, đồ ăn ngon. Tuy nhiên, phòng đôi khi chưa khử mùi kỹ, nhà mình có trục chặc với van xả nước của bồn tắm nhưng khách sạn sau 24h vẫn chưa xử lý.

Xin chào Quý khách Phuong!

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long và dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi khi biết rằng trải nghiệm của Quý khách chưa hoàn toàn đáp ứng được kỳ vọng.

Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi về những bất tiện mà Quý khách đã gặp phải, đặc biệt là vấn đề mùi và lỗi cơ sở vật chất trong phòng, ảnh hưởng đến sự thư giãn của Quý khách. Những ý kiến đóng góp quý báu này đã được chúng tôi ghi nhận và chuyển đến các bộ phận liên quan để rà soát, điều chỉnh và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ trong thời gian tới.

Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại và mang đến một trải nghiệm trọn vẹn, xứng đáng hơn với sự tin tưởng của Quý khách.

Trân trọng!
Trần Nguyễn Yên Thi
Giám đốc Vận hành

sample_comments.title: What a Fun Hotel
sample_comments.text:
We stayed here to celebrate the New Year with the family and it did not disappoint. We joined the New Year gala dinner and it was so much fun. The entertainment, food and fire crackers were fabulous. We even won a massage at the spa which was so good. Thank you so much. We loved it so much, we even tried to extend our stay but they were fully booked. Totally understandable- this place is popular with tourists and locals.
The only thing to be aware of is that breakfast can be a bit chaotic with lots of people, but this should be expected for a family oriented hotel.
Thank you for a wonderful stay - we would love to be able to come stay again.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you so much for sharing your wonderful experience with us.

We are thrilled to hear that you and your family had such a fun and memorable New Year celebration at our hotel. It's fantastic to know that you enjoyed the gala dinner, entertainment, food, fireworks, and even the special surprise at the spa --- congratulations on winning the massage!

We truly appreciate your understanding regarding availability during the festive period and breakfast busyness, especially as a family-oriented resort during peak season. Your kind words about the overall experience mean a great deal to our team.

Thank you once again for choosing to celebrate such a special occasion with us. We would be absolutely delighted to welcome you and your family back for another stay in the future.

Best regards,
Nguyen Thi Hai Yen
Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Dreckig, Zimmer sind in die Jahre gekommen, Service unterirdisch
sample_comments.positives: Die Lage auf einer eigenen Insel und der Ausblick sind sehr schön.
sample_comments.negatives:
Wie dieses Hotel 5 Sterne und die guten Bewertungen erhalten konnte, ist für mich absolut unverständlich. Für uns war es vielleicht das schlechteste Hotel, in dem wir bisher waren - und wir sind schon viel gereist.
Die Lage, Aussicht und das Gebäude von außen sind toll - das war's dann leider auch schon.
Es fing schon beim Check-in an: es gibt nur eine winzige Rezeption für dieses riesige Hotel, dementsprechend sind die Wartezeiten. Die durften wir in der überfüllten Lounge verbringen, da kurz zuvor eine riesige chinesische Reisegruppe angekommen war. Von 5-Sterne-Atmosphäre hier schon mal keine Spur. Im Zimmer ging es dann weiter: Wir hatten eine Executive Suite gebucht, Aussicht top - Sauberkeit wirklich unterirdisch. Unter anderem fanden wir unter dem Tisch noch gebrauchte Taschentücher und im Bad braune Flecken in Toilettennähe. Bis es einem annehmbaren Sauberkeitslevel entsprach, mussten wir 2 mal nachreinigen lassen. Das Zimmer war auch einfach abgewohnt und alt, mit diversen Spuren an Möbeln und Wänden. Außerdem war das Babybett, das wir Wochen zuvor angefragt hatten und das uns an der Rezeption auch als bereits vorbereitet versprochen wurde, noch nicht da und wir mussten 2 mal danach fragen.
Jetzt zum Essen: es gibt Abends ein Buffetrestaurant, über das Essen lässt sich nicht meckern. Großes und abwechslungsreiches Angebot, auch zum Frühstück. Freundlichen Service darf man hier aber nicht erwarten. Wenn man etwas anderes als Wasser aus einer Karaffe trinken will, muss man schon jemanden suchen, der einem das bringen kann. Ein Lächeln sucht man auch eher vergebens bei den Service-Mitarbeitern.
Wer mittags etwas an der Poolbar essen möchte, sollte nicht die an den Tischen aufgedruckten QR-Codes zum bestellen verwenden. Nachdem wir nach 30 Minuten mal nach den Getränken gefragt haben, wurde uns mitgeteilt, dass das Bestellen (trotz Bestätigung auf dem Handy) mit den QR-Codes nicht funktioniert.

sample_comments.title: Great rooms
sample_comments.text:
Breakfast is very loud, not a relaxing way to start the day. 
They could increase frequency of ferries to the island. 
The rooms were very spacious and clean. 
Pool was fantastic. 
Guests should not need to speak to reception to arrange refund of security deposit, this should be automated. 
Despite the little areas for improvement, this was a great a resort and i world visit again.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback following your stay at Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our spacious and clean rooms, as well as the pool facilities. It is also encouraging to hear that, overall, you had a great stay and would consider visiting us again.

At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your constructive comments regarding the breakfast ambiance, ferry frequency, and the refund process for the security deposit. Your feedback has been carefully noted and shared with the relevant teams as we continuously look for ways to enhance both comfort and convenience for our guests.

Thank you once again for your valuable insights. We truly look forward to welcoming you back for an even more seamless and relaxing experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Tran Nguyen Yen Thi (Ms.)
Director Of Operations

We were there for a 2 night stay and enjoyed all facilities a lot. But one thing needs to be improved, and that is the staff at pool bar. sample_comments.title: Von A-Z alles perfekt!
sample_comments.positives:
Der beste Aufenthalt, den wir je in einem Hotel hatten! 
Wir wurden in Hanoi von einem sehr ordentlichen und netten Fahrer abgeholt. Das (E-)Auto war so gut wie neu und sehr sauber. Der Fahrer ist (trotz bekanntem Verkehrschaos in Hanoi) sehr vorsichtig und zurückhaltend gefahren. 
Im Auto gab es sogar kostenfreies Wasser für uns!
Der Empfang an der Rezeption auf dem Festland war äußerst freundlich und zuvorkommend. Uns wurde das Gepäck abgenommen und zum Zimmer gebracht. Wir sind nach schnellem Check In per Boot auf die Insel zum Hotel gefahren, wo wir ebenfalls unglaublich freundlich empfangen wurden. 
Das Zimmer war sehr groß mit eigenem Balkon und schönem Blick aufs Meers. Die Sauberkeit lies auch nicht zu wünschen übrig! Wir haben uns sofort wie zuhause gefühlt und konnten unseren Aufenthalt genießen. 
Das Frühstücksangebot ist erschlagend groß. Hier kommt jeder auf seine Kosten! Uns wurden alle Wünsche von den Lippen abgelesen und sofort erfüllt. Das Personal ist in allen Bereichen sehr sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. 
Aufgrund unseres tollen Aufenthaltes in Ha Long Bay haben wir nun unseren Aufenthalt in Hoi An in das Vinpearl dort umgebucht. Es war einfach toll!

sample_comments.text: The hotel it's beautiful! The staff are very nice and polite! The only thing I was a bit disappointed was with the food in general! Was ok ! but for the type of Hotel I was expecting much more! even on breakfast buffet or dinner buffet !

sample_comments.title: An unforgettable stay
sample_comments.text:
The 10 of us are very impressed with this resort on this beautiful island.
-Vinpearl staff arranged transport for us from Hanoi hotel to this resort. Fast check-in at the grand ferry terminal. Only a few minutes ferry transfer with short waiting time
-A wide spread of sumptuous food for both breakfast and dinner buffet at Bayview Resturant
-Good and value for money spa services. It costs 700,000 VND after the 500,000 VND discount for body massage.
-Pavilion Restaurant is a very big and unique restaurant sitting on the sea. I enjoyed the ambience and 'live' band while dining there. It is a pity that it was rather quiet when we dined there twice. I suppose most hotel guests are not aware of this restaurant. It was the concierge staff who showed us the way.
-We like the gym which opens at 6 am
-Sunset Halong Bay cruise from 3 to 6 pm. We cancelled the trip as most of my group members felt the night gets dark from 5 pm and the cruise tour is too short. The staff was very kind to help us arrange booking from another cruise operator.
sample_comments.positives: Pavilion Restaurant, beautiful and spacious rooms with postcard view and great food

sample_comments.negatives: Schoonheid, massage en rust

sample_comments.title: Stunning hotel with amazing staff!!!!
sample_comments.text: What an absolutely gorgeous hotel from the check in area on land to the whole hotel on the island. It is just something else!!!! The staff are extremely nice and professional! Service like you have never seen!!! Everywhere you look in this hotel is just top notch!!! Never seen anything like it. The lady who looks after you via WhatsApp is amazing!!!! She couldn't have done more for us thank you. The breakfast selection was like nothing I have seen at a hotel! The pools are unbelievable, the indoor pool has to be my favorite of any pool I have ever used!! We dined in all the restaurants and the service was perfect!! The 30percent discount we got for pre booking really was appreciated.The only unpleasant thing we had was the noise in the room. Our room was on the north east of the island. When the evening came the music from the beach bar across the water was absolutely ridiculous. You couldn't just relax on the balcony due to the thumping. It's like being next door to a disco. So we went for dinner thinking that when we got back it would have stopped. Nope. Instead you could still hear it through the closed door. I rang reception to ask when does it stop and they said 11 to which it did stop. If I was staying more than one night I would have asked to be moved. We payed for sea view and we got sea view but it came with us feeling like we were living next to a nightclub. I can't help but feel they know this and put all the familys with kids on this side thinking kids are noisey so they can go that side. As we were a family and everyone else I seen that side had kids too. It was just a shame as we were told at reception we had the the best view, sea and pool view. It wasn't pool view, maybe a mix up in the language, it was an insane view just not worth the thumping all eve. I would definitely stay again if the budget allowed it but would want a view overlooking the pool and that's what I would recommend for anyone who wishes to stay. But unfortunately for me the noise made this hotel loose a star from 5 to 4.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your stay at Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long. We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the beauty of our resort, our facilities, the pools, the restaurants, and the high standard of service provided by our team. Your kind words about our staff and WhatsApp support are truly appreciated and will be shared with them.

We sincerely apologize for the noise from the beach bar that affected your stay. We completely understand how this impacted your experience, and we appreciate your constructive feedback. We will review our room allocations and communication regarding view types to ensure our future guests have the most enjoyable stay possible.

We hope to welcome you back in the future and offer you a stay with a view overlooking the pool, so you can fully enjoy the tranquility of our resort. Thank you again for your honest feedback.

Warm regards,
Nguyen Thi Hai Yen
Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: A sudden appearance or debut.
sample_comments.text:
The dock leading to the resort was the most gorgeous, spacious, and luxurious. The room had a king-size bed with an extra bed, but it was small for the price, and the TV was also small. There was only one armchair with an ottoman and a chair in front of the dresser, making it uncomfortable to relax. There was a terrace, but there were too few chairs. I wished they had increased the number of chairs to match the number of guests. The complimentary water was in glass bottles, making it inconvenient for transport. Despite there being no shop or vending machines in the hotel, the minibar selection was poor.

Breakfast had a wide variety of items, but the taste was average. There were too few types of cheese and fruit. There were too few tables for the number of guests, making it crowded. Some items were out of stock. I stayed for two nights, and it was good that the juice changed daily.

Due to the rain, the outdoor pool was not usable, but the indoor pool was warm, and staff were always present, making it safe to play. They also had floating rings available for rent. It seemed okay to go to the pool in the room's gown. The dedicated lockers and shower rooms were clean and luxurious. Like the outdoor pool, it would have been nice if it were a bit larger.

The kids' room also had large playground equipment that was enjoyable. There was a clinic right next door, which provided peace of mind for playtime.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience at Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long. 
We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us so far

First of all, allow me to apologize for any inconvenience as it is not up to your expectations. Besides, we are glad to hear that you enjoyed our beautiful resort and our team provided you with good service in a friendly manner, and we will be sure to pass along your kind words to them.

Thank you again for your sympathy and on behalf of hotel management board, we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming your back.

Warm regards

Dzung Dinh Viet
Front Office Manager
Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long

sample_comments.title: Luxury retreat
sample_comments.text:
A big, plush hotel. Good gym for a serious workout with weights if you have it to yourself, which we did. Indoor pool and saunas (men and women separate). The outdoor pool is huge, and the 2 beaches are perfect. Paddle boarding, volleyball and tennis are available, but we went in March/April and the water was too cold. We had 3 rooms and one had a lot of bathroom issues, but the staff sorted them all out very quickly.
Breakfast was good quality, with lots of variety. We stayed 3 nights and did not get bored of the food.
The continuous ferries to the mainland take 2mins and are very easy. We would then take a taxi to dinner but didn't find anything very good! Close by there is a water park and park with rides for a good adrenaline rush. 
Most guests seemed to stay for one night around a bay cruise, but we quite liked the opportunity to stay longer and just catch our breath between travels around this amazing country.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào!
Dear Valued Guest Tania,
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your detailed review!
We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and made the most of our facilities - from the gym, pools, saunas, and beaches to the convenient ferry service. It's great to know our team was able to quickly resolve the bathroom issue, and that our breakfast selection kept things fresh and enjoyable throughout your 3-night stay.
We appreciate your feedback about the nearby dining options and understand how that might have been a bit underwhelming. We'd be happy to recommend some hidden gems in the area next time you visit. It's wonderful that you chose to stay longer than most and used this time to relax and recharge during your journey through this amazing country.
We truly hope to welcome you back for another memorable stay in the future!
Kind regards,
Dzung Dinh Viet
Front Office Manager
Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long
